pr.title: Record: Order-16 Frozen N-gram Oracle + Learned Gate + TTT — val_bpb 0.0274 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Frozen order-16 n-gram oracle feeds a learned per-token gate plus complementary training and score-first TTT on an 11-layer model.
techniques: Frozen order-16 n-gram oracle with 4M buckets and backoff
Learned 17-way gate plus mixer loss and complementary token weighting
Score-first TTT with adaptive-temperature AdamW and byte-weighted loss
